_comment: Copy this file to ~/.claude/clauderc.private.json and fill in your own values. It is user-level (org/personal-wide), NOT per-project. The clauderc plugin's create-jira-ticket and scratch skills read it at runtime. Keep it out of any public repo. If it is absent, the skills degrade gracefully: scratch falls back to local-only scope, and create-jira-ticket stops and tells you which values to set.
